relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Seven bowls are poured as completed symbolic judgment.
Beast-mark allegiance becomes painful exposure.
The sea bears the sign of death.
Rivers and springs become witness.
The waters' messenger names Divine justice.
The spilled life of witnesses is remembered.
The altar agrees: true and just are the judgments.
The sun becomes a sign of scorching exposure.
Hardened hearts blame instead of turn.
The beast-throne darkens.
Pain does not become repentance.
Euphrates dries for symbolic gathering.
Frog-like spirits emerge from dragon, beast, and false prophet.
False signs gather kings into conflict.
Stay awake and keep your garments.
The gathering place is called Harmagedon.
The final bowl declares: it has happened.
Creation shakes under the sign.
Babylon is remembered before Divine.
Islands and mountains vanish from the old order.
Even severe signs do not soften hardened speech.

contemplative_note: Revelation 16 is the hardening mirror: plagues expose allegiance, propaganda gathers power, and the watcher is told to stay awake.
